transcript.text:
(One day, a strange girl enters the store...)
For spicy stir-fried chicken...
Can you make 10 servings?
(What?)
(Okay, if that's what she wants...)
(Is she Tzuyang, by the way...?)
(Of the people who eat that much...)
(there's a girl called Tzuyang...) What's the name? Tzuyang
(She looks weirdly similar to Tzuyang...)
(A strange girl who eats 10 servings of spicy stir-fried chicken like nothing...)
(Are you Tzuyang...?) Are you her? But you look so different in real life
(After the cold winter, the weather these days is like spring)
Hello, everyone
I am here today near Chung-Ang University
(Today's dish is spicy stir-fried chicken!) to eat spicy stir-fried chicken
(Today's restaurant is located in an alley between the crowded downtown) If you go into the alleyway from downtown,

there's a very worn-down spicy stir-fried chicken place
And it's been in business for 30 years!
(Located in Dongjak-gu, Seoul) Wow, but unless you come into the alley way, you wouldn't know
("Hongcheon Spicy Stir-fried Chicken")
(You can really tell how it aged from the outside...) Wow! Even the door looks worn down
Let's try going in
(Enters the store) Hello!
It feels like an old-fashioned store!
(The inside is nostalgic with that antique vibe) It feels like a very old-fashioned store
(Scans the menu) They have spicy stir-fried pork too!
(There are a variety of dishes including today's spicy stir-fried chicken) Spicy stir-fried chicken... There's a spicier one too
Rice cake, udon noodles, cheese, Korean meatballs...
Excuse me!
How much spicy stir-fried chicken is included in one serving?
- It's about 200g per serving! - 200g?
Then...

For spicy stir-fried chicken...
Can you make 10 servings?
10 servings...???
We can only make it up to 6 servings...
I don't really like veggies
so you can exclude veggies
(In goes the chicken) and add more chicken...
But can you eat all 10 servings?
(Yes... she can...) Yes... I can eat a lot
(The amount order makes you dizzy...) I have a big stomach
Please lessen the veggies and add a lot of chicken
(10 servings with a bunch of meat, let's go!) to make 10 servings...
You can eat it all?
But why are you not fat?
What's the name, Tzuyang...
Huh?!

You know me?!!
(Is that you?) Are you her?
(She was looking for Tzuyang right in front of Tzuyang LOL) You look so different in real life!
I was surprised seeing how much you eat...LOL
Hahahahaha
(They heat up the oil first) It's unique how they added the oil here first for the dish
I've seen the way you eat and it was
quite impressive
(Veggies appear) Add a little bit of veggies
(Even if it's little, it's still a lot!) There's a lot of meat, so I'll grill the meat separately
They give it to you like it's sautéed, cool!
(The owner is here) The pan is too heavy!
Oh, what kind of pan is this?
- Cast iron! - Oh, a cast iron pan!
Cast iron spicy stir-fried chicken pan!
(The meat appears) I'll add a little bit more

- Thank you! - Because I don't think I can add the seasoning
Wow, it looks good!!
A little spicy?
I would like it a little spicy, please!
(She added more meat on top of the seasoning) Wow, the seasoning!
The producer isn't going to eat later?
Yes! It's just me, hehe
I feel so bad for him
LOLOLOL
(He always eats before he comes to film) I already ate
Teach me too
(Share your secret) How to eat this much and not gain weight
(It doesn't make you fat if it's delicious) You just need to enjoy it, don't you?
What sauce is this?
(Sauce to dip the meat or veggies in!) You can just dip it here or dip onions in it
Is this the spicy stir-fried chicken sauce?

(That's right) Yes!
Mmm, it's good!
We only use chicken from Korea
(It's more delicious and you can trust where it comes from) We only use raw chicken as well
Wow, it looks good!
(How can I not like you, spicy stir-fried chicken...) That's why everyone likes it
(It looks so...appetizing!) Wow, it looks so good!
These are 10 servings
(Just laughing...LOL)
(With the sizzling sound,)
(10 servings of spicy stir-fried chicken is complete!)
Wow, thank you!!
It looks so delicious!!
You always eat so much
(What a fascinating kid...)
Bon appetit!

First off, the meat
is very chunky, as you can see
The meat...It's really good!
The meat is not dry at all
It's very tender and soft
(The face of truth) Wow! The meat is so good
(Right now) It's really delicious right now
(The timing is fresh and the chicken is at its best..) The meat is perfectly cooked right now!
Is the chicken high quality?
For chicken breasts,
you can feel the direction of the meat, but not this
It's so juicy
In terms of chicken,
(Her words don't match her actions) it's not my favorite compared to other meat
But I would love it if it's this kind of texture!
A rice cake!

It's made of flour! So chewy!
The ones made with flour,
when you eat it when it's freshly made,
(Ultimate definition of soft and chewy!) I love that it's so soft and chewy
(Dip it in the spicy stir-fried chicken sauce) I think I can dip it in the seasoning too
It's good
(It's good?)
The sweet potato probably isn't cooked yet, right?
I'll let the sweet potato cook more
With perilla leaves
Oh, it's good!
Excuse me!
Do you have any perilla leaves?
Should I wash some?
(Hehe, thank you!) A little bit! Thank you
(Here is your perilla leaves)

(+ Perilla leaves) Thank you!
Wow, the perilla leaves are fresh too!
(Let's start wrapping it away!)
Onions! Should I add a raw onion too?
It's good
(One more perilla leaf wrap!) It's so good wrapped in perilla leaves!
Should I add sweet potato too?
Oh, the one right now was cooked really well!
(You're really eating it all...?)
(She's so into perilla leaves) Perilla leaves!
(With a bunch of meat...)
(Suddenly radish from the water kimchi??) Will this radish be good?
(Very satisfied)
Eating it with
radishes like this
(Very good, feeling like it's a radish wrap!) feels like I'm eating radish wraps, which is nice!

(Found the sweet potatoes!) Oh! I feel like this sweet potato is cooked
(The chances are 50:50) There are cooked and uncooked ones
(It's cooked, hehe)
Should I let it boil so that it's warm?
They gave me so much as well
(Students of Chung-Ang University come here often!) Since it's near a college, they give you a lot
(Like this?) Cover it!
(It's quite weird...) It's weird
(Don't let it stick to the bottom!)
Now that it's dinnertime,
(Customers are rushing in...) a crowd of customers would come in at once
Perilla leaf!
(What is the difference between the front and back of the perilla leaf?) Is there a difference which way I place it?
(Tzu-test begins!) Let me try experiencing the difference
No. 1
(Okay, got it...)

(For no. 2, the rough side goes inside!)
Oh? It's different! It's slightly different
The texture that my tongue touches is different
(No. 2) I can smell the perilla leaves even stronger
(Whoa whoa) Eating it like this is more...
more delicious
(She's eating well)
Do you want udon?
Udon?! Sure
Yay, they gave me udon noodles on the house!
(Udon is here) Thank you!
(Gotta have udon noodles when having spicy stir-fried chicken!)
Thank you, I'll enjoy it
(Popular pick "udon noodles") This is quite popular these days
You gotta add udon noodles when you're eating spicy stir-fried chicken
Mmm, it's good

(So shiny...!)
Is udon more popular than stir-fried rice?
Nahh, it can't beat stir-fried rice... That's the most popular one
They always add one
Where did all the meat go?
(Adding udon noodles was perfect!)
Oh, you gotta have these noodles for this dish!
- (I told you it was popular) - Udon noodles suit it best than other noodles
Wow, but I love the old-fashion vibe of this place
Starting with the old table
(The entrance where you can feel the effects of time...) Even the door... it's all old-fashioned
It must've looked like this 30 years ago too, right?
(Tzuyang, showing off her big appetite for 27 years)
The owner was worried it would be salty but it's not!
It's not too strong
and it's mild

(Respects personal preference) I think this much is delicious enough
(Where is the udon?)
Oh, last time
when I didn't eat stir-fried rice after spicy stir-fried chicken,
(The public raged...) the comment section went crazy...
(Dark mode) I might end annoyingly
Oh, so good!
(Should I add rice...) Should I eat stir-fried rice or not?
(Nom nom)
(Forgot about the fried rice and kept devouring...)
(I slayed...)
Wow, now that I kept eating it, it's spicy
It's spicy if you keep eating it
(The fried rice keeps lingering...) Fried rice...will go great with this
If I don't eat it again,
(Predicted comment: Why do you not eat stir-fried rice?) they'll get mad, right?

(Dark mode complete) I feel like it'll be fun
(Another perilla leaf wrap that was the most delicious)
(LOL Endless perilla leaf wrap...LOL)
(+Raw onion)
(Scraping it all)
(Get every little bit till the end!)
(It's so good!!)
(Spicy stir-fried rice + udon, total of 10 servings CLEARED)
I ate all the sauce as well
I'll eat stir-fried rice next time!
(I'll go easy on you once) What is this?
Actually, it's dinnertime and the customers keep coming,
so I will have to stop eating here today
(I promise to eat stir-fried rice next time!) I'll eat stir-fried rice next time when I eat spicy stir-fried chicken
I had a great meal today
I'll come back next time to eat stir-fried rice

How do you eat this all?
Oh, it was so good
The best!
Oh, it's spicy
